stdMortalityCalculator.title: SMR gʋlsgo
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Bãan-wilgri la kũum sõor-yõoda.
stdMortalityCalculator.exactCI: Sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng sẽn yaa sɩda
stdMortalityCalculator.ciExactTitle: Sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng ({{confidence}}%) – Sɩda
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Kũum sẽn yaa bɩlg (yãk ≤ 5), tũ sõngr sɩda (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.jstatMissing: jStat pa be – sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng la p-yõoda lebgla maan-wilgri.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% wʋsga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% bɩlga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Kũum wʋsg yaa sɩd n yɩɩ wʋsg (IC fãa be 1.0 rɩtɩ).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Kũum bɩlg yaa sɩd n yɩɩ bɩlg (IC fãa be 1.0 nudga).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Wʋgdgã pa sɩd n yɩɩ wʋsg (IC bee 1.0 pʋgẽ).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: SMR wɛɛnga kũum sẽn yãka ne kũum sẽn da yaa tẽed bɩ ninsaal sẽn be zĩig a yembr pʋgẽ.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: IC wilgd tɩ lebgrã yaa sɩda. Sã n bee 1.0 pʋgẽ, lebgrã pa sɩd.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: Yit Poisson la χ². Sõngr sẽn yaa sɩda kũum bɩlg wɛɛnga.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Lebgr Fisher sẽn yaa bɩlg, pa sõngd wʋsg.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Rothman & Boice (1979) maan-wilgri, yaa sɩda O > 5.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpVdbDesc: Sõngr sẽn yaa bɩlg (1982) : IC = SMR × (1 ± 1,96/√O).

stdMortalityCalculator.title: SMR gʋlsgo
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Bãan-wilgri la kũum sõor-yõoda.
stdMortalityCalculator.ciExactTitle: Sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng ({{confidence}}%) – Sɩda
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Kũum sẽn yaa bɩlg (yãk ≤ 5), tũ sõngr sɩda (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% wʋsga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% bɩlga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Wʋsgã yaa sɩd n yɩɩ wʋsg (IC fãa be 1,0 rɩtɩ).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Bɩlgã yaa sɩd n yɩɩ bɩlg (IC fãa be 1,0 nudga).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: SMR yaa yõod sẽn wɛɛnga kũum sẽn yãka ne kũum sẽn da yaa tẽed.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: IC sẽn pa tɩk 1,0 wilgd tɩ lebgrã yaa sɩd.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: IC Garwood (1936) yit χ². Tɛst Poisson sɩda. Sõngr OpenEpi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Tɛst Mid-P Lancaster (1961). Pa sõngd wʋsg. IC yit bisection.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRgDesc: IC log-normal : exp(ln(SMR) ± z/√obs). Rothman & Greenland (1998).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpChi2Desc: Pearson χ² (1 ddl). Pa kõt IC.
stdMortalityCalculator.reportFooter: Raport sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã — bãan-wilgri tʋm-tʋmd.

twoByTwoTable.title: Taabal 2×2
twoByTwoTable.explanation: Taabal 2×2 wɛɛnga bãan (ẽe/ayi) ne bãan (ẽe/ayi). Sõngr kõt: Fisher tɛst, mid-p, khi-karrɛ, odds ratio, bãan wʋgdg, bãan bɩlg, la bõn-kɩtba.

proportions.title: Wɛɛng-yõoda
proportions.description: Wɛɛng-yõod sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng.
proportions.useCaseDescription: Ninsaal 500 pʋgẽ, 75 yaa bãan. Bãan wɛɛnga yaa wãn?

proportionsSample.title: Wɛɛng-yõod tɩlg-sõor
proportionsSample.explanation: Tʋm-tʋmd kõt tɩlg-sõor sẽn tõe n paam wɛɛng-yõod sɩda.
proportionsSample.exampleDescription: Bɩ tɩlg-sõor wɛɛnga 20% ne sɩd-wʋgdg ±3% la yam kãseng 95% :

oneRate.title: Tũudg a yembr tɛst
oneRate.explanation: Wɛɛnga tũudg sẽn yãka ne tũudg sẽn yaa tẽed. Tũudg Poisson kũum bɩlg wɛɛnga.
oneRate.exampleDescription: Ninsaal 10 000 sẽn tũ wakat 5 yẽ, bãan 25 yãka.

compareTwoRates.title: Tũudb a yi manegre
compareTwoRates.explanation: Wɛɛnga tũudb a yi yit ninsaal-wakat. Kõt tũudg yõod (rate ratio) la tũudg wʋgdg ne IC, la Mantel-Haenszel tɛst.

anova.title: ANOVA a yembr
anova.description: Sor wɛɛnga sẽn yaa wʋsg (3 bɩ wʋsga).
anova.explanation: ANOVA wɛɛnga tẽed tɩ sor wɛɛnga fãa yaa a yembr. Wɛɛnga sor wʋgdg sor sẽn be sɩngr pʋgẽ ne sor sẽn be sɩngr a taab pʋgẽ.

tTest.title: Student t-tɛst
tTest.description: Sor a yi manegre (sɩngr sẽn pa taab).
tTest.explanation: t-tɛst wɛɛnga sor a yi. Kõt Student t-tɛst (sor wʋgdg yaa a yembr) la Welch t-tɛst (sor wʋgdg yaa a yi).

meanConfidenceInterval.title: Sor sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng
meanConfidenceInterval.explanation: IC sor yit sɩngr (n, sor, écart-type). Tũ Student t.

meanDifferencePower.title: Sor wʋgdg pʊs-kãseng
meanDifferencePower.explanation: Pʊs-kãseng yaa sɩd n lebg tɛst. Kõt tɩlg-sõor, wʋgdg tẽed, la sor wʋgdg.

meanDifferenceSample.title: Sor wʋgdg tɩlg-sõor
meanDifferenceSample.explanation: Tɩlg-sõor n paam sor wʋgdg tẽed.
meanDifferenceSample.standardDeviation: • Écart-type (σ) — a yembr bɩ a yi

medianPercentileCi.title: Tẽnga la pɛrsɛntɩl IC
medianPercentileCi.description: Sõngr sẽn pa tũ sor tẽed.
medianPercentileCi.explanation: IC tẽnga la pɛrsɛntɩl (25e, 75e) yit binomial bɩ sõor.

unmatchedCaseControl.title: Bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg manegre
unmatchedCaseControl.description: Bãan ne bãan sõsg bãan-yembr zãn-kɩtba pʋgẽ.
unmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Manegr bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg. Kõt OR, IC 95% la Mantel-Haenszel χ² tɛst.

sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.title: Tɩlg-sõor (bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg)
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Tɩlg-sõor bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg. Kõt tɩlg-sõor ne yam kãseng, pʊs-kãseng, bãan yit wɛɛnga sɩngr pʋgẽ, la OR.

matchedCaseControl.title: Bãan-yembr sõng tɩrg manegre
matchedCaseControl.description: Sõor sẽn sõng tɩrg (1:1, 1:n, M:N) manegre.
matchedCaseControl.explanation: Bãan-yembr sẽn sõng tɩrg, kõt OR Mantel-Haenszel, IC, la McNemar tɛst.

cohort.title: Koort zãn-kɩtba manegre
cohort.description: Bãan wʋgdg (RR), bãan bɩlg (RD), la bõn-kɩtba.
cohort.explanation: Koort zãn-kɩtba pʋgẽ, bãan yãka la bãan pa yãk be n tũ wakat. Kõt RR, RD, la bõn-kɩtba.

rct.title: RCT (randomized controlled trial)
rct.explanation: Kõt RR, ARR, NNT, ne IC.

screening.title: Bãan-nongre tɛst manegre
screening.description: Sensibilité, spécificité, VPP, VPN, likelihood ratios.
screening.explanation: Wɛɛnga bãan-nongre tɛst ne gold standard. Kõt sensibilité, spécificité, VPP, VPN, likelihood ratios, Youden, Kappa.

doseResponse.title: Dose-response (χ² tendance)
doseResponse.description: Tendance linéaire tɛst bãan tɩlg wʋsg wɛɛnga.
doseResponse.explanation: Mantel-Haenszel χ² tendance linéaire tɛst. Kõt p-yõod 1 ddl.

rByCTable.title: Taabal R x C
rByCTable.description: Taabal sẽn yaa tɩlg fãa manegre.
rByCTable.explanation: Manegr taabal R (sõor) × C (tẽng). Kõt Pearson χ², G², coefficient de contingence, Cramer V.
rByCTable.associationBloodGroupDisease: Sõsg zĩm sɩngr ne bãan (3 sɩngr × 4 wilgri)

randomNumbers.title: Sõor sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã yãkdg
randomNumbers.description: Sõor sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã randomisation la maan-wilgri wɛɛnga.
randomNumbers.explanation: Yãkd sõor uniforme, normale, binomiale, Poisson. Tõe n yãk sõor RCT randomisation.
randomNumbers.randomization100Patients: Randomisation ninsaal 100 sɩngr a yi pʋgẽ (1:1) :

simulation.description: Bãan-wilgri sẽn yit zĩig a yembr n tɩ zĩig a taab.
simulation.explanation1: Maan-wilgr bãan-wilgri zĩig wʋsg. Zĩig fãa tar ninsaal la S, E, I, R, D, Q. Zĩig sõngd taab ne ninsaal kẽn-kẽn.
simulation.explanation2: Tũ ODE wakat sẽn yaa bɩlg. Tõe n lebg β, sigma, gamma, mu, mobility. Wilgri be map, graph, network.
simulation.seird: SEIRD : S, E, I, R, D
simulation.seiqrd: SEIQRD : S, E, I, Q, R, D
simulation.evolutionCurves: Courbes : S, E, I, R, D wakat pʋgẽ
simulation.graphs: Graphiques : Ligne | Épaisseur | Remplissage | Grille | Annotations
simulation.step2: Tũ Démarrer. Wilgri be map la graphiques.
simulation.step4: Lebg mode comparaison n maneg scénario a taab.
simulation.technicalNote: Wakat tɩlg 1 jʋn. Mobility yit diffusion prevalence wʋgdg.

geospatial.interactiveCartographicVisualization: Map sẽn tõe n tʋm ne a taaba
geospatial.explanation1: Tõe n yãk sõor CSV bɩ Excel, wilgri points, clusters, heatmap.
geospatial.multiLayers: Calques wʋsg. Tõe n lebg couleur, rayon, opacité.
geospatial.clustering: Clustering : regroupe points n paam clusters.
geospatial.heatmapConfig: Heatmap : Rayon 25 | Flou 15 | Opacité min | Dégradé
geospatial.note: Dataset fãa tar gũusg a menga.
geospatial.step1: Yãk CSV ne latitude, longitude, cas.
geospatial.step2: Yãk clustering n wilg zĩig fãa, bɩ heatmap n yãk hotspots.
geospatial.step4: Tũ Analyser n paam AI raport.

workspace.explanation1: WebR – tõe n gʋls, yãk, maan R kood. Console, graphiques.
workspace.explanation2: Exécution script, gestion fichiers, console interactive, graphiques, packages.
workspace.interactiveConsoleFeature: Console : tõe n gʋls R, flèches history, graphiques.
workspace.graphicalVisualizations: Graphiques : capture automatique. Mode grille, animation, téléchargement.
workspace.animationBetaDetail: Animation (bêta) : script sẽn maan graphiques wʋsg, tõe n wilg animation.
workspace.animationNote: Animation tʋmda sequences sẽn yãka, pa graphiques sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã.
workspace.packageInstallationDetail: Package yãkdg : webR package pre‑compilés. Console wilgda logs.
workspace.packageNote: Packages sẽn tar dépendances système pa tõe.
workspace.codeExample:
# Courbe épidémique
x <- seq(-5, 10, length.out = 200)
for (i in 1:40) {
  mu <- i / 8
  y <- dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = 1.5)
  plot(x, y, type="n", ylim=c(0, 0.3), axes=FALSE)
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)), c(y, rep(0, 200)), col="#3b82f622", border=NA)
  lines(x, y, col="#3b82f6", lwd=3)
  Sys.sleep(0.04)
}
workspace.step4: Tũ flèches bɩ bouton n zãgs animation. Tõe n yãk image.

explorer.explanation1: PubMed NCBI. Tõe n bãn, filtre, yãk résumé.
explorer.advancedSearch: Bãn kãseng : mots‑clés, filtre année, type article, tri.
explorer.meshGenerator: MeSH : yit expression, yãk traduction MeSH.
explorer.favoritesExport: Favoris & export : 200 articles. Export RIS (EndNote, Zotero).
explorer.results: Lebgr : bascule recherche/favoris, détails article, graphique temporal.
explorer.step2: Tũ MeSH n paam requête optimisée.
explorer.step5: Bascule Favoris, Export tout n yãk RIS.

analysis.title: IA manegre bãan-wilgri
analysis.description: IA manegre na n wa sõma — insights, cluster, recommandations.

settings.timelineDescription: Slider wakat — sõor sɩda na n be.

modal.title: Wilgri bãan-wilgri
modal.description: Sõor sɩda — OMS, Johns Hopkins, CEREMUJER.

toasts.fileEmpty: Fichier pa be bɩ pa tõe
toasts.formatError: Format pa be — CSV bɩ Excel koe

empty_state.title: Maan-wilgri sɩngr
empty_state.description: Yãk bãan-wilgri wilgri bɩ scénario n sɩng maan-wilgri.

data_modal.title: Yãk sõor
data_modal.csv_label: CSV — zĩisi (colonnes: id, name, population, S, E, I, R, D, latitude, longitude, color, connections, cluster)

explanation_modal.title: Gaf-wilgri
explanation_modal.slider_body: Lɩb slider J0–J365 n yãk bãan-wilgri jʋn fãa. Map la taabal yit rũndã-rũndã. Tũ Play n yãk wakat kẽn-kẽn.
explanation_modal.models_body: SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD. Sor fãa yaa a menga, pa lebgd wakat fãa.
explanation_modal.rt_body: Rt (taux de reproduction effectif) yaa R0 × S/N × (1 − réductions). Rt < 1 wilgd tɩ bãan-wilgri be gũusg pʋgẽ.
explanation_modal.phase_body: Grafik S–I wilgd sor S × I pʋgẽ. Sor sẽn yaa wa tʋʋma yaa bãan-wilgri sõma.
explanation_modal.interventions_body: Sõngr fãa yɛɛsda β, yit sɩngr jʋn. Sõngr tõe n sõng taab (plafon 95%).
explanation_modal.comparison_body: Tũ "Maneg" n sɩng maan-wilgri a to ne gũusg a taab. Kurv wilgda taab.

examples_modal.title: Bãan-wilgri wilgri
examples_modal.subtitle: Gũusg la sõor yit bãan-wilgri sɩda

covid19.name: COVID-19
covid19.description: Bãan-wilgri dũniyã fãa. Tɛɛgr a ɛɛrɛ, wakat incubation 5–6 jʋn, CFR ~1%.

ebola2014.name: Ebola
ebola2014.description: Bãan-wilgri kãseng Afrika Wʋsg. CFR ~50%. Tɛɛgr ne ninsaal kẽn-kẽn.

flu_seasonal.name: Grippe saisonnière
flu_seasonal.description: Bãan-wilgri wakat fãa. R0 tẽnga, yɩɩ sõma wakat bɩlg, kũum bɩlg.

measles.name: Rougeole
measles.description: Bãan sẽn tɛɛgd wʋsg (R0 12–18). Vaksẽ tʋmda n sõma.

meningitis.name: Méningite
meningitis.description: Bãan-wilgri wakat fãa zĩig sẽn boond tɩ "ceinture méningitique" Afrika. Kũum ~10%.

cholera.name: Choléra
cholera.description: Bãan-wilgri yit koom sẽn pa sõma. Kũum wakat bɩlg sã n pa tʋm tɩrgo.
